title: CBN Says Azimo, Transfer Wise Not Registered IMTOs
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) on Wednesday said Azimo Transfer Wise is not a registered International Money Transfer Operators (IMTOs). This was contained in a statement sgned by the apex bank act
html:
The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) on Wednesday said Azimo Transfer Wise is not a registered International Money Transfer Operators (IMTOs).

This was contained in a statement sgned by the apex bank acting director, corporate communications, Osita Nwanisobi “The attention of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has been drawn to the activities of Messrs. Azimo and Messrs. Transfer Wise, both of which are purportedly transacting business, albeit unauthorised, as International Money Transfer Operators (IMTOs)”.

According to the statement “The Bank wishes to notify the general public that neither Messrs. Azimo nor Messrs. Transfer Wise is licensed by the Central Bank of Nigeria to operate as an International Money Transfer Operator (IMTO)”.

“The Public is therefore advised to beware of the activities of Messrs. Azimo and Messrs. Transfer Wise and desist from patronizing the companies forthwith. Anyone who patronizes the unregistered companies does so at his or her own risk”.
